item.title: 习近平在上海阐述中国开源、“以人为本”的人工智能愿景
item.summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping called for greater global AI cooperation at WAIC Shanghai, pledging training support for developing nations amid sore US-China technology relations. The post Xi sets out China’s open-source, “people-centred” AI vision in Shanghai appeared first on Capacity .
